_comment: Curated database for files where the search pipeline cannot reliably return the canonical repo as Top-1 hit. Each entry has '_reason' explaining WHY it must stay hardcoded. Re-run tools/find_redundant.py periodically: as HF's search index improves or as we add patterns, entries here can be removed.
_section_clip_vision_h94: h94/IP-Adapter has only 2 visible repos in its public listing - the IP-Adapter image_encoder is bundled inside one of them as 'models/image_encoder/model.safetensors' (or sdxl_models/.../model.safetensors). HF search can't find them by the workflow filename because the upstream filename is generic 'model.safetensors'. Comfy-Org has _repackaged mirrors that win the regular search.

CLIP-ViT-H-14-laion2B-s32B-b79K.safetens._reason: Upstream is models/image_encoder/model.safetensors inside h94/IP-Adapter. Comfy-Org/clip-vit-h-14-laion2b-s32b-b79k_repackaged also hosts a copy and HF search prefers it because the repo name matches the filename better.

CLIP-ViT-bigG-14-laion2B-39B-b160k.safet._reason: Same as CLIP-ViT-H - upstream is sdxl_models/image_encoder/model.safetensors inside h94/IP-Adapter.

sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors._reason: Comfy-Org has multiple repos containing this file (sigclip_vision_384 AND newer hunyuanvideo_1.5_repackaged that bundles it as a side-file). The newer repo wins the search ranking; this entry pins the dedicated sigclip repo.

_section_lcm_lora: Latent-consistency LoRAs are stored upstream as 'pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors' (the diffusers convention). Filename-based HF search returns dozens of unrelated 'mylcmlora*' / SD-1.5-LCM checkpoints with the same filename. Three official LoRA repos exist (sdv1-5, sdxl, ssd-1b) and the trusted-author probe can't disambiguate which one matches our specific filename.

lcm-lora-sdv1-5.safetensors._reason: Upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors. Three latent-consistency LoRA repos exist (sdv1-5, sdxl, ssd-1b); without an explicit pin we'd download the wrong one or none.

lcm-lora-sdxl.safetensors._reason: Same as lcm-lora-sdv1-5 - upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors.

lcm-lora-ssd-1b.safetensors._reason: Same as lcm-lora-sdv1-5 - upstream filename is pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors.

_section_civitai_lykon: Lykon's ControlNet 1.1 pack on CivitAI. CivitAI's API search doesn't return results by filename - the parent model is named 'ControlNet 1.1 Models' and the variant filenames (controlnet11Models_*.safetensors) only appear in the version metadata. The numeric URL '/api/download/models/<id>' uses opaque CivitAI database IDs (44736 etc.) that have no relation to the variant name.

controlnet11Models_depth.safetensors._reason: CivitAI version-id is an opaque database key. There is no derivable rule mapping '_depth' -> 44736.

controlnet11Models_openpose.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.

controlnet11Models_canny.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.

controlnet11Models_tileE.safetensors._reason: Same as controlnet11Models_depth - opaque CivitAI version-id.
